ACCESS_CONTROL_001.question_text: Does the engagement enforce role-based access controls (RBAC) and conduct periodic access reviews for all accounts?

ACCESS_CONTROL_002.question_text: Are privileged accounts managed with just-in-time (time-bound) access and multi-factor authentication (MFA) for enhanced security?

ACCESS_CONTROL_003.question_text: Are all administrative and other high-privilege credentials stored in a secure vault with regular rotation and controlled access approvals?

ACCESS_CONTROL_004.question_text: Are user accounts promptly de-provisioned or adjusted when personnel change roles or leave the project to avoid orphaned accounts?

ACCESS_CONTROL_005.question_text: Is there a privilege inventory (mapping of tools, roles, and user accounts) maintained to support access audits and ensure least privilege?

ACCESS_CONTROL_006.question_text: Does each user have a unique user account (no shared or generic accounts) to maintain accountability and traceability for system access?

ACCESS_CONTROL_007.question_text: Are system access logs and administrator actions regularly monitored and audited for unusual access patterns or policy violations?

DATA_PROTECTION_001.question_text: Are all sensitive data (including PII/PHI) encrypted both at rest and in transit, using industry-standard encryption algorithms and key management practices?

DATA_PROTECTION_002.question_text: Are secure data handling, storage, and disposal policies in place (e.g., limited data retention, data destruction after use) to prevent unauthorized access or leakage?

DATA_PROTECTION_003.question_text: Is a data classification and labeling scheme implemented to identify sensitive healthcare data (e.g., by sensitivity or compliance requirements) and enforce proper handling?

DATA_PROTECTION_004.question_text: Are Data Loss Prevention (DLP) measures (e.g., monitoring, content filtering) implemented to detect and prevent unauthorized transfer of sensitive information?

DATA_PROTECTION_005.question_text: If production data (e.g., PHI) is used in non-production environments, is it properly sanitized or masked to protect privacy?

DATA_PROTECTION_006.question_text: Are remote workstations and networks used by the delivery team required to meet security standards (VPN, updated antivirus, device encryption) to safeguard client data?

DATA_PROTECTION_007.question_text: For remote support sessions, are there controls to ensure confidentiality (e.g., secure remote access tools, no local data recording) to avoid exposing PHI unnecessarily?

REGULATORY_COMP_001.question_text: Can the service provider produce evidence of compliance with relevant healthcare regulations (e.g., HIPAA, GDPR) and contract-specific security/privacy requirements?

REGULATORY_COMP_002.question_text: Are formal compliance audits or assessments conducted regularly to ensure adherence to legal and contractual obligations?

REGULATORY_COMP_003.question_text: Have all project team members completed mandatory compliance trainings (e.g., HIPAA, data privacy/security training) and acknowledged relevant NDA/BAA agreements?

REGULATORY_COMP_004.question_text: Is there a process to stay updated on changes in healthcare regulations (e.g., HIPAA updates) and to incorporate those changes into the projects practices?

REGULATORY_COMP_005.question_text: Are Business Associate Agreements (BAAs) or similar legal agreements in place for all parties handling PHI, and are they reviewed for compliance?

REGULATORY_COMP_006.question_text: Does the engagement have defined protocols to promptly report any compliance incidents or data breaches to customers and regulators as required by law?

REGULATORY_COMP_007.question_text: Are data retention and archival policies aligned with healthcare regulatory requirements and client expectations (e.g., data retention periods, secure archival)?

SKILL_ALIGNMENT_001.question_text: Are team members technical skills and certifications (including healthcare IT or EHR systems expertise) clearly matched to the projects requirements?

SKILL_ALIGNMENT_002.question_text: Do team members have prior experience in similar healthcare projects or with relevant technologies (e.g., clinical systems, medical device software) to ensure domain familiarity?

SKILL_ALIGNMENT_003.question_text: Is a skills/competency matrix maintained to ensure all necessary technical, domain, and project management competencies are covered by the team?

SKILL_ALIGNMENT_004.question_text: Are key roles (project manager, solution architect, technical leads) staffed with individuals possessing adequate seniority and a proven track record in similar projects?

SKILL_ALIGNMENT_005.question_text: Is there a plan or budget for ongoing training, certifications, or upskilling to address any skill gaps identified in the team during the project?

SKILL_ALIGNMENT_006.question_text: Does the team have access to specialized subject matter experts (e.g., compliance officers, cybersecurity specialists) when complex issues arise?

TEAM_COMPOSITIO_001.question_text: Is the delivery team appropriately staffed to meet project demands (considering volume of work, timelines, and complexity of deliverables)?

TEAM_COMPOSITIO_002.question_text: Are roles and responsibilities within the team clearly defined and balanced across project management, technical, and domain areas to avoid gaps or overlaps?

TEAM_COMPOSITIO_003.question_text: Are backup resources or cross-training plans in place to cover critical roles and mitigate single points of failure on the team?

TEAM_COMPOSITIO_004.question_text: Is there a procedure for quickly onboarding new or replacement team members (with knowledge transfer) to minimize disruption to the project?

TEAM_COMPOSITIO_005.question_text: Are processes in place to manage resource transitions (e.g., replacing staff with 30-60 days notice) without impacting timelines or quality?

TEAM_COMPOSITIO_006.question_text: For variable workloads, are triggers or thresholds defined to scale the team up or down (e.g., adding resources if volume increases) to maintain service levels?

TEAM_COMPOSITIO_007.question_text: If 24/7 support or multi-time-zone coverage is required, is team staffing structured (shifts, on-call rotation) to meet those needs adequately?

SCOPE_CLARITY_001.question_text: Is the projects scope of work clearly defined in a Statement of Work (SOW) or contract, including detailed deliverables and specific in-scope and out-of-scope items?

SCOPE_CLARITY_002.question_text: Is there an established change control process for any modifications to scope, requiring documented approval before changes are implemented?

SCOPE_CLARITY_003.question_text: Are acceptance criteria and acceptance processes for key deliverables clearly defined and agreed upon by the client (e.g., sign-offs, review periods)?

SCOPE_CLARITY_004.question_text: Are out-of-scope requests or tasks identified and managed via a formal process (logged, evaluated, and approved or deferred) to prevent scope creep?

SCOPE_CLARITY_005.question_text: Have critical assumptions, dependencies, and constraints related to scope been validated and agreed with the client to avoid misunderstandings?

SCOPE_CLARITY_006.question_text: For fixed-price engagements, are milestones and deliverables tied to payment terms and clearly defined to avoid misalignment on completion criteria?

VENDOR_COORDINA_001.question_text: Are roles and responsibilities across all vendors and internal teams clearly delineated (e.g., through a multi-party RACI matrix) to avoid gaps or overlaps in accountability?

VENDOR_COORDINA_002.question_text: Is there a shared project plan or integrated schedule that accounts for deliverables and dependencies across multiple vendors involved?

VENDOR_COORDINA_003.question_text: Are regular cross-vendor meetings or sync-ups held with documented action items to ensure alignment and manage interdependencies?

VENDOR_COORDINA_004.question_text: Has a primary point of contact or integration manager been designated to coordinate between the client and all service providers for consistent communication?

VENDOR_COORDINA_005.question_text: Is there an agreed mechanism for cross-vendor issue resolution and escalation (to handle issues that span across multiple service providers)?

GOVERNANCE_FRAM_001.question_text: Is a governance structure established (steering committees, project review boards) with regular meetings to oversee project progress and address issues/escalations?

GOVERNANCE_FRAM_002.question_text: Are escalation paths and decision-making authorities clearly documented (who can approve what) to facilitate timely resolution of issues and changes?

GOVERNANCE_FRAM_003.question_text: Is a formal risk management process in place (e.g., maintaining a risk register and reviewing it periodically) as part of project governance?

GOVERNANCE_FRAM_004.question_text: Are major decisions, action items, and changes recorded (e.g., in meeting minutes or decision logs) to ensure accountability and traceability?

GOVERNANCE_FRAM_005.question_text: Is there an agreed-upon cadence for executive status reviews or steering committee meetings (e.g., monthly/quarterly) involving senior stakeholders from both sides?

GOVERNANCE_FRAM_006.question_text: Is a Business Continuity Plan (BCP) or contingency plan documented for the project, and is it reviewed or tested as part of governance to handle major disruptions?

STAKEHOLDER_ENG_001.question_text: Is a comprehensive communication plan in place (meeting schedule, status reports, etc.) to keep all stakeholders regularly informed of progress and issues?

STAKEHOLDER_ENG_002.question_text: For critical incidents or major milestones, is there a defined communication protocol (e.g., rapid notification, regular updates) to keep stakeholders updated in real-time?

STAKEHOLDER_ENG_003.question_text: Are stakeholder expectations and satisfaction monitored (e.g., through periodic feedback or surveys) and are adjustments made based on their feedback?

STAKEHOLDER_ENG_004.question_text: Has a stakeholder mapping been done to identify key stakeholders and tailor communication frequency/detail according to their needs/interest?

STAKEHOLDER_ENG_005.question_text: If stakeholders are in multiple regions/time zones, are communication and meeting times adjusted to accommodate them effectively?

SLA_KPI_DEFINIT_001.question_text: Are Service Level Agreements (SLAs) and Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) clearly defined, documented, and aligned with the engagementâ€™s objectives and client expectations?

SLA_KPI_DEFINIT_002.question_text: Is there a system or tool in place to measure, track, and report on each SLA/KPI at the agreed reporting interval (e.g., weekly, monthly)?

SLA_KPI_DEFINIT_003.question_text: Are the SLA targets realistic, mutually agreed upon, and based on either historical data or industry benchmarks to ensure achievability?

SLA_KPI_DEFINIT_004.question_text: Are any penalties, rewards, or at-risk fee mechanisms associated with SLA performance clearly defined in the contract and understood by the team?

SLA_KPI_DEFINIT_005.question_text: Does the engagement have criteria for SLA exceptions (e.g., downtime due to force majeure) and a process for documenting and approving such exceptions?

SLA_KPI_DEFINIT_006.question_text: Is there a defined process to periodically review and renegotiate KPIs/SLAs (if needed) based on changing circumstances or after initial baselining?

PERFORMANCE_MON_001.question_text: Is project performance closely monitored via dashboards or reports that track key metrics (e.g., schedule adherence, effort burn, quality metrics) against targets?

PERFORMANCE_MON_002.question_text: Are any deviations from project plan or performance metrics identified early and communicated, with corrective action plans developed and tracked?

PERFORMANCE_MON_003.question_text: Are quality metrics (defect rates, rework percentages, test coverage, etc.) captured and analyzed to maintain deliverable quality?

PERFORMANCE_MON_004.question_text: Is delivery budget or effort usage tracked (e.g., hours vs. budget for T&M engagements, or cost-to-complete for fixed-price) and shared with stakeholders?

PERFORMANCE_MON_005.question_text: Does the team conduct regular retrospectives or lessons-learned sessions to identify process improvements for ongoing or future phases/projects?

PERFORMANCE_MON_006.question_text: Are performance trends analyzed (across months/quarters) to identify early warning signs of issues (like throughput decline or cost overrun) and inform leadership proactively?

PERFORMANCE_MON_007.question_text: Do stakeholders have access to a real-time or periodic performance dashboard providing transparency into project status and any emerging risks/issues?
